concerns.text: FR-001 requires CSV/JSON transcript ingestion with chronological parsing. Plan.md has download_datasets.py for FR-012 and detect_markers.py for FR-002, but no explicit task for parsing CSV/JSON transcript files as specified in FR-001.

FR-011 requires self-reported engagement collected ≥7 days after conversation or statistical control for common-method variance. Plan.md covers FR-004/FR-013 in extract_metrics.py but doesn't explicitly address the 7-day collection window or common-method variance control.
SC-003 requires regression analysis to complete within 30 minutes. Plan.md specifies ≤6 hours total runtime but doesn't explicitly mention the 30-minute regression completion time requirement.
SC-005 requires ≥95% logging completeness measurement. Plan.md has pipeline_logger.py for FR-008 but doesn't explicitly mention measuring/logging completeness as specified in SC-005.

FR-010 requires multiple imputation (m=5) or complete-case analysis with bias assessment if demographics unavailable. Plan.md has regression_config.yaml for FR-010 but doesn't explicitly mention the imputation or bias assessment requirements.
quickstart.md references code/pipeline/run_full_pipeline.py and code/logging/verify_logging.py which are not listed in plan.md's source code structure under code/.
